recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: TRON: Ares
recommendations.overview: A highly sophisticated Program called Ares is sent from the digital world into the real world on a dangerous mission, marking humankind's first encounter with A.I. beings.

recommendations.title: TRON: Legacy
recommendations.overview: Sam Flynn, the tech-savvy and daring son of Kevin Flynn, investigates his father's disappearance and is pulled into The Grid. With the help of a mysterious program named Quorra, Sam quests to stop evil dictator Clu from crossing into the real world.

recommendations.title: Ra.One
recommendations.overview: When the titular antagonist of an action game takes on physical form, it's up to the game's less powerful protagonist to save the world.

recommendations.title: The Last Starfighter
recommendations.overview: Video game expert Alex Rogan finds himself transported to another planet after conquering the video game The Last Starfighter, only to find out it was just a test. He was recruited to join the team of best Starfighters to defend their world from the

recommendations.title: Tetris
recommendations.overview: In 1988, American video game salesman Henk Rogers discovers the video game Tetris. When he sets out to bring the game to the world, he enters a dangerous web of lies and corruption behind the Iron Curtain.

recommendations.title: The Librarian: The Curse of the Judas Chalice
recommendations.overview: While on a dangerous mission to recover the historic Judas Chalice, Flynn is saved by Simone. But when double-crossed by a respected professor and ambushed by a ruthless gang, Flynn realizes Simone's secret, his true mission and a shocking discovery

recommendations.title: Beta Test

recommendations.title: Chiara Ferragni: Unposted
recommendations.overview: Chiara Ferragni, the first fashion influencer in the world, reveals how the digital revolution has changes business world, communication, fashion, culture, through a portrait in which she's the protagonist, both as a woman and as digital entrepreneur
